title: 💼 Hiring: Business Development Professional (Futures BD) - Ourbit Exchange
description_short:
📍 Korea, LATAM, Turkey, MENA, Vietnam & other international markets | 🕐 Posted 4 hours ago - May 16, 2026 | 🧑‍💻 Crypto Exchange | Futures Trading

The company is hiring Business Developm...
description_full:
📍 Korea, LATAM, Turkey, MENA, Vietnam & other international markets | 🕐 Posted 4 hours ago - May 16, 2026 | 🧑‍💻 Crypto Exchange | Futures Trading

The company is hiring Business Development professionals for multiple regional markets at Ourbit Exchange to drive expansion and user growth.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Identify, expand, and maintain relationships with potential business partners, including cryptocurrency projects, KOLs, channel agents, and direct investors.
- Develop and execute business development strategies to drive user growth and increase market share.
- Conduct market research and competitive analysis, track industry trends.
- Coordinate internal teams and collaborate with product, technology, and marketing to implement projects.
- Participate in business negotiations and contract signing.
- Report on progress and performance metrics.

🔑 Requirements:
- Extensive experience in Futures BD roles, familiarity with agency systems and commission mechanisms.
- Strong knowledge and experience in the cryptocurrency industry, familiar with digital asset trading and regulations.
- Excellent business negotiation and communication skills.
- Strong team spirit and collaboration abilities.
- Strong market analysis and data processing capabilities.
- Fluent in spoken and written English preferred.

📩 To apply: Send your application to careers@ourbit.com. Mention the specific regional market you are targeting.

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/namili-69a2911a5_were-hiring-business-development-professionals-ugcPost-7460941948414070785-WvPQ
